headline: FormFactor, Amkor, and Teradyne Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after Micron's blowout day signaled that AI-driven chip demand is structurally undersupplied which is bullish news for the equipment makers and foundries that build the capacity.

headline: Dow Jones Futures Rise After S&P 500, Nasdaq Hit Highs; 5 AI Stocks In Buy Areas
summary: The S&P 500, Nasdaq and Russell 2000 hit new highs as Micron surged to top a $1 trillion market cap. Caterpillar, Viavi flashed buy signals.
